headline: Assessing Snap-on (SNA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Snap-on is on investors’ radar now Snap-on (SNA) has drawn fresh attention after its recent share performance, with the stock last closing at $390.75 and posting positive returns over the past week, month and past 3 months. That move comes against a backdrop of annual revenue of $5.16b and net income of $1.02b. This gives investors a concrete snapshot of the company’s current scale and profitability. headline: SNA Q1 Deep Dive: Secular Trends and New Products Drive Resilient Performance
summary: Professional tools and equipment manufacturer Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.2% year on year to $1.31 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.69 per share was 1.2% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Snap-On Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management characterized as resilient in the face of uncertainty, citing higher sales and earnings along with continued investment in new products and technology. headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on Snap-on, Raises Price Target to $395
summary: Baird  analyst Luke Junk   maintains Snap-on (NYSE:SNA) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $380 to $395.
